changes: Dashboard summary cards auto-refresh every 30 seconds — no page reload needed
Low-stock toast alert when any inventory item drops below its minimum threshold
Smooth update banner replaces the blocking dialog — restart whenever you're ready
CI workflow: tests run automatically on every push to main
Kuike logic extracted into its own module with table-driven intent routing
Fixed 2 Kuike routing bugs found by automated tests (43 tests, all passing)
Kuike rewritten as fully local assistant — no API key required
Kuike moved to a floating bubble widget visible on all admin pages
Kuike now supports 13 intents: ventas, inventario, empleados, horarios pico, pagos, órdenes, productos, promociones, precios, bitácora, clientes frecuentes y más
Split payment support (efectivo + tarjeta en la misma orden)
Larger touch targets across POS screens
Enhanced charts on the reports page
Activity log for all admin actions
